events.title: ☕️ Coffee Talk
events.venue: Iffy Books, 404 S. 20th St, Philadelphia, PA 19146
events.description: A social hangout every first and third Monday for trans and non-binary people, their significant others, and allies. We have snacks and coffee.

events.title: ✏️ The Writing Room
events.venue: Iffy Books, 404 S. 20th St, Philadelphia, PA 19146
events.description: Come co-work with other writers in three 40-minute units of silent writing. Writers and projects of any type welcome. 10-minute breaks and accountability check-ins between units. BYO coffee, water, computer chargers, notepads, etc.

events.title: 📼 Analog A/V Session
events.venue: Iffy Books, 404 S. 20th St, Philadelphia, PA 19146
events.description: Come experiment with VHS tapes and audio cassettes! We'll have equipment on hand for analog-to-digital and digital-to-analog transfers.

events.title: 🔊 DJ Basixxx with Mixxx
events.venue: Iffy Books, 404 S. 20th St, Philadelphia, PA 19146
events.description: Learn to use Mixxx, a free and open source DJ program. You'll learn to find tracks on the web, load them into Mixxx, and get started with beatmatching. Bring your own laptop and headphones.

events.title: 🔋 Beginner Soldering: Li-Ion Battery Pack
events.venue: Iffy Books, 404 S. 20th St, Philadelphia, PA 19146
events.description: Make a rechargeable battery pack for your LoRa node, a microcontroller such as an ESP32 or Pi Pico, or anything that runs on 3–4 Volts. Perfect for folks who've never soldered before! You'll need to buy a li-ion battery pack kit.

events.title: ⚡️ Beginner Soldering: LED Spinning Top
events.venue: Iffy Books, 404 S. 20th St, Philadelphia, PA 19146
events.description: Build a spinning top toy with LED lights that flash when it spins. No previous soldering experience required! Registration and kit purchase available.

events.title: 💻 Cyberdeck Meetup
events.venue: Iffy Books, 404 S. 20th St, Philadelphia, PA 19146
events.description: A cyberdeck is a DIY laptop based on a single-board computer (SBC) such as Raspberry Pi, with a tiny LCD screen and keyboard enclosed in a folding case. Bring an SBC to this meetup and start building your own! We'll have LCD screens and keyboards for sale.

events.title: 🏴 Anarchy Summer Reading Group: 'The Utopia of Rules' by David Graeber (1st half)
events.venue: Iffy Books, 404 S. 20th St, Philadelphia, PA 19146
events.description: Meeting every two weeks to discuss classics of anarchist literature. Currently discussing 'The Utopia of Rules' by David Graeber.
